title: FLAG-MODEL A3: AssistResult gains a flags field; the 12 free-text parsers populate it
description: AssistResult (planner/assist.py:33-57) carries only prefill + optional note. Add an optional flags field (list of {path, span, verdict, severity, message}). The 12 free-text parsers in planner/specs.py (all except B2 bind-measurement-channels and F2 propose-assignments, per FREETEXT_SELECTORS_BY_SPEC) currently call audit_prefill expecting it to raise; they must instead collect the flags it returns (A2) and attach them to the returned AssistResult, while still raising on the hard-reject classes. parse_narrative (A1) returns a bare dict today, so the narrative parser also needs the AssistResult(+flags) shape or an equivalent carrier. Bare-return parsers normalize through views.py / apply, so a flags channel must thread there too (see C2/B2). Atomic gap; depends on A2.
impact: AssistResult cannot carry flags, so the parsers have nowhere to return soft-flag annotations to the apply / UX layers.
proposed_resolution: Add an optional flags field to AssistResult; the 12 free-text parsers collect audit_prefill flags and attach them (raising only on hard-reject classes); the bare-return narrative parser gains the same carrier.
